testcase.name: agent readiness > does not register routes when agent is disabled
agent readiness > registers well-known endpoints when agent is enabled
Akismet spam check > returns ham when Akismet says false
Akismet spam check > returns spam when Akismet says true
Akismet spam check > returns pending when no API key
Akismet spam check > returns pending on network error

testcase.name: Akismet spam check > returns pending on unexpected response
Akismet spam check > sends correct endpoint URL
Akismet spam check > sends form-encoded body with expected fields
analytics > hashVisitor > produces consistent hash for same IP on same day
analytics > hashVisitor > produces different hashes for different IPs
analytics > hashVisitor > returns a string of reasonable length
API routes > lists docs
API routes > filters docs by type
API routes > returns single doc by slug
API routes > returns 404 for missing doc
API routes > PUT /api/v1/docs/* creates a document
API routes > rejects requests without Bearer token
API routes > accepts requests with valid Bearer token
moderation API > GET /api/v1/comments lists all comments
moderation API > POST /api/v1/comments/:id/hide hides a comment
moderation API > POST /api/v1/comments/:id/unhide unhides a comment
moderation API > DELETE /api/v1/comments/:id deletes a comment
moderation API > GET /api/v1/blocklist returns blocklist
auth > serves OAuth authorization server metadata
auth > authorization endpoint returns redirect with code
auth > token endpoint exchanges code for JWT token
auth > token endpoint rejects invalid code
auth > verifyBearerToken rejects missing token
auth > verifyBearerToken accepts valid JWT
auth > verifyBearerToken rejects expired JWT
CLI bootstrap > scaffolds default config and directories when missing
CLI bootstrap > loads a valid config YAML
CLI bootstrap > merges port CLI override into HTTP protocol config
CLI bootstrap > merges --no-gemini override
CLI bootstrap > merges --no-gopher override
CLI bootstrap > substitutes environment variables in config values
bridge > shouldSyndicate returns true for type: post
bridge > shouldSyndicate returns false for non-post types
bridge > syndicate enqueues a background job for new posts
bridge > syndicate skips when all platforms already syndicated
cache > stores and retrieves parse results
cache > stores and retrieves rendered content
cache > invalidates both caches
component resolvers > NavMenu component > returns navigation links
component resolvers > RecentPosts component > returns empty message when no posts
component resolvers > Comments component > returns heading when no mentions exist for slug
component resolvers > Comments component > renders ham mentions as mention nodes
component resolvers > Comments component > skips spam mentions
comment config resolver > getGlobalCommentConfig > returns defaults when no comments config
comment config resolver > getGlobalCommentConfig > merges partial config over defaults
comment config resolver > resolveCommentConfig > returns global defaults when doc has no frontmatter overrides
comment config resolver > resolveCommentConfig > respects per-doc frontmatter overrides
comment config resolver > resolveCommentConfig > disables everything when global enabled is false
comment config resolver > resolveCommentConfig > throws on non-existent slug
config loader and merger > deep-merges nested objects without mutating target
config loader and merger > validates required top-level keys
config loader and merger > validates site.canonicalBase
config loader and merger > loads config and substitutes environment variables
config loader and merger > merges CLI port override
database > initializes schema with required tables
database > inserts and retrieves docs
database > searches via FTS5
database > manages taxonomy terms and relationships
database > records syndication
database > stores OAuth tokens
database > uses parameterized queries for safe term lookup
federation > serves WebFinger endpoint
federation > returns 400 for missing resource
federation > serves Actor endpoint
federation > serves Outbox endpoint
frontmatter > isDocPrivate > returns true for private visibility
frontmatter > isDocPrivate > returns false for public visibility
frontmatter > isDocPrivate > returns false when no visibility
frontmatter > isDocPrivateFrontmatter > returns true for private
frontmatter > isDocPrivateFrontmatter > returns false for public
frontmatter > isDocPrivateFrontmatter > returns false when key missing
frontmatter > isFutureDated > returns true for future date
frontmatter > isFutureDated > returns false for past date
frontmatter > isFutureDated > returns false when no date
frontmatter > isFutureDated > checks publishAt before date
frontmatter > isFutureDatedFrontmatter > returns true for future publishAt
frontmatter > isFutureDatedFrontmatter > returns false for past date
frontmatter > isFutureDatedFrontmatter > returns false when no date
HTTP server > serves the home page
HTTP server > returns 404 for missing slug
HTTP server > serves health endpoint
inbound mention processing > stores a mention from a valid webmention
inbound mention processing > skips when inbound type is disabled
inbound mention processing > skips when target link not in source HTML
inbound mention processing > skips on SSRF rejection (localhost source)
inbound mention processing > skips when target does not match canonicalBase
inbound HTTP routes > POST /webmention returns 202
inbound HTTP routes > POST /webmention returns 400 on missing fields
inbound HTTP routes > POST /pingback returns XML-RPC response
inbound HTTP routes > POST /pingback returns 400 on invalid request
inbound HTTP routes > POST /trackback/:slug returns 202
inbound HTTP routes > POST /trackback/:slug returns 400 on missing url
indexer > indexes a document with frontmatter
indexer > indexes taxonomy terms from frontmatter
ingest manager > ingestUrl fetches URL, converts to MDX, and saves
ingest manager > ingestUrl strips script, style, nav, footer tags
ingest manager > ingestUrl throws on non-ok response
IPFS integration > IPFSLink component > returns empty when no current slug
IPFS integration > IPFSLink component > returns empty when doc has no CID
IPFS integration > IPFSLink component > returns link when doc has html_cid
IPFS integration > IPFSLink component > falls back to content_cid when html_cid is absent
IPFS integration > IPFSLink component > uses custom gateway URL from config
IPFS integration > DocMeta CID storage > persists contentCid and htmlCid
resolveLayout > wraps document content in default skeleton
resolveLayout > selects collection layout for blog collection
resolveLayout > throws when layout file is missing from embedded defaults
resolveLayout > throws when layout has no slot
MCP tools > lists tools with correct names
MCP tools > search_docs returns results
MCP tools > read_doc returns markdown
MCP tools > read_doc returns error for missing slug
MCP tools > list_collections returns configured collections
MCP IPFS tools > includes IPFS tools when ipfs.enabled is true
MCP IPFS tools > excludes IPFS tools when ipfs is not configured
MCP IPFS tools > get_doc_cid returns CIDs from database
MCP IPFS tools > get_doc_cid returns null CIDs when not pinned
micropub > rejects requests without Bearer token
micropub > creates a post with valid token
micropub > returns 400 for missing properties
parseToIR > parses a simple heading and paragraph
parseToIR > extracts frontmatter
parseToIR > rejects unknown JSX components with Security Error
parseToIR > rejects <script> as unknown component
parseToIR > allows known components
parseToIR > parses ordered and unordered lists
parseToIR > parses code blocks
parseToIR > parses links and images
parseToIR > parses inline formatting
parseToIR > parses blockquotes and thematic breaks
parseToIR > parses math blocks
parseToIR > parses tables
parseToIR > returns empty errors array on success
POSSE reply fetching > fetchMastodonReplies > stores replies from Mastodon context
POSSE reply fetching > fetchMastodonReplies > skips already-existing mentions
POSSE reply fetching > fetchMastodonReplies > handles empty descendants gracefully
POSSE reply fetching > fetchMastodonReplies > handles API error gracefully

testcase.name: POSSE reply fetching > fetchBlueskyReplies > stores replies from Bluesky thread
POSSE reply fetching > fetchBlueskyReplies > skips already-existing Bluesky mentions
POSSE reply fetching > fetchBlueskyReplies > handles empty replies gracefully
POSSE reply fetching > fetchBlueskyReplies > handles API error gracefully

testcase.name: sitemap renderer > renders empty sitemap when no docs
sitemap renderer > includes public posts in sitemap
sitemap renderer > excludes private documents
llms.txt renderer > renders header with site info
llms.txt renderer > groups docs by collection
llms.txt renderer > excludes private documents
robots.txt renderer > renders default robots.txt with AI crawlers blocked
robots.txt renderer > renders selective AI crawler block
robots.txt renderer > renders allow AI crawlers
robots.txt renderer > includes custom rules
robots.txt renderer > includes content signal when enabled
security.txt renderer > returns empty string when no contact or expires
security.txt renderer > renders full security.txt
content-signals header > adds Content-Signal header when enabled
content-signals header > does not add header when disabled
markdown negotiation > returns false when agent is not enabled
markdown negotiation > returns false when accept header does not include text/markdown
renderers > renders Gemtext
renderers > renders Markdown
renderers > renders JSON-LD structured data
renderers > renders minimal JSON-LD without author/org
frontmatter parsing > parses frontmatter from MDX content
frontmatter parsing > returns empty attributes for content without frontmatter
frontmatter SSRF validation > prevents private IP addresses
JSON-LD structured data > renders in HTML output
hashVisitor > produces consistent hash for same IP on same day
logger > initializes without crashing
ingestUrl SSRF > rejects private IP URLs
subscriber entity > creates subscriber with required fields
newsletter API validation > rejects missing email on subscribe
newsletter API validation > rejects missing fields on contact form
router > matches home route
router > matches health route
router > matches doc route for known collection
router > returns doc route for unknown collection
router > returns collection docs
router > returns taxonomy docs
RSS renderer > renders empty RSS feed when no posts
RSS renderer > includes public posts in RSS feed
RSS renderer > excludes private posts
RSS renderer > excludes non-post types
RSS renderer > includes enclosure tags when present
protocol servers > Text Protocol returns home
protocol servers > Text Protocol returns 404 for missing slug
protocol servers > Text Protocol returns 404 for future-dated doc
protocol servers > Finger returns author info
SSRF protection > accepts valid HTTPS URL
SSRF protection > accepts valid HTTP URL
SSRF protection > rejects localhost hostname
SSRF protection > rejects 127.0.0.1
SSRF protection > rejects 0.0.0.0
SSRF protection > rejects ::1
SSRF protection > rejects 10.x.x.x private IP
SSRF protection > rejects 192.168.x.x private IP
SSRF protection > rejects 172.16-31.x.x private IP
SSRF protection > rejects private IPv6 (fc00::/7)
SSRF protection > rejects non-HTTP schemes
SSRF protection > rejects malformed URL
storage > write creates a file
storage > read returns file content
storage > delete removes a file
storage > list returns all files
storage > writeStorage and deleteStorage convenience functions work
sync manager > pushToRemote throws when remote not configured
sync manager > pushToRemote throws when no content directory
sync manager > pushToRemote sends PUT requests for MDX files
sync manager > syncTwoWay throws when remote not configured
sync manager > syncTwoWay fetches remote index and pushes local changes
tooling scaffold > has a working test runner
workmatic job queue > initializes workmatic and creates queues
workmatic job queue > enqueues an inbound mention job
workmatic job queue > enqueues a POSSE reply fetch job
workmatic job queue > skips POSSE reply fetch when no syndication record exists
workmatic job queue > getOrchestrator returns the initialized instance
